SQLLite.SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(NWD.NON_WORKING_DATE, 'dd') AS "Day" FROM NON_WORKING_DAYS NWD WHERE NWD.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' AND TO_CHAR(NWD.NON_WORKING_DATE, 'mm') = TO_NUMBER(${param.month}) AND TO_CHAR(NWD.NON_WORKING_DATE, 'yyyy') = TO_NUMBER(${param.year})

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2
